title: APEX Active Docs Infra Bounded Decomposition Plan
objective: Convert the existing APEX-root docs and infra classification into a concrete tranche-based decomposition plan with exact target homes, archive outcomes, and follow-on execution packets without performing physical file movement.
constrained_outputs: A tranche-ordered decomposition plan for the remaining APEX-root docs and infra assets
An exact bounded movement manifest by source slice and target home
Explicit archive outcomes and non-import rules for residual historical material
Smallest follow-on execution packet recommendations for approved tranches
validation_steps: Confirm the plan decomposes APEX-root docs and infra by bounded slice rather than broad folder movement
Confirm transitional lineage is not silently promoted to active future-state authority
Confirm each approved tranche has an explicit target home or archive outcome
Confirm no physical file moves or PM-schema authority edits occur in this packet
sql_permission_note: This packet is decomposition planning only. It does not authorize file movement, SQL changes, or schema-authority changes.
